title: Papa pops free — Eva: 'Daddy push me on the swing!'
prompt: Mid-shot at @playground-park — soft mulch ground, playground swing-set softly visible BACKGROUND-LEFT, soft warm afternoon light. @Papa already CENTER-LEFT standing on the mulch with both feet planted, just-freed-from-the-slide goofy expression, both hands gently brushing mulch off his shoulders, warm crinkled-eye dad-smile. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Eva already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the mulch right next to Papa with both feet planted, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, both hands softly clasped together at her chest in a cute pleading gesture, eyes huge and shining with cheerful kid wonder. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa softly chuckles, gently brushes one shoulder with one hand then the other shoulder with the other hand, warm dad-laugh. Papa (warm cheerful chuckle): "That slide was TOO small for the wolf-Daddy!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva tugs softly at her own clasped hands, beaming with kid pleading-cuteness. Eva (cheerful pleading kid-voice, warm and bright): "Daddy! Daddy, push me on the SWING! Pleeeeaase?" Papa (warm cheerful chuckle, looking down at Eva fondly): "To the SWING-set!" Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both clasped at her chest in pleading gesture. Both stay grounded with both feet on the mulch throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no walking off-frame. The mulch and playground stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
